bp_evaluable_ratio.denominator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with propagated GO annotations
bp_evaluable_ratio.numerator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with at least one evaluable biological-process term

cc_evaluable_ratio.denominator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with propagated GO annotations
cc_evaluable_ratio.numerator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with at least one evaluable cellular-component term

evaluable_protein_ratio.denominator_definition: qualifying raw GOA protein accessions entering the ontology and mapping chain
evaluable_protein_ratio.numerator_definition: qualifying raw GOA accessions producing at least one evaluable propagated PFP term

goa_to_selected_uniprot_mapping_ratio.denominator_definition: all qualifying GOA accessions after evidence, NOT, object, and ontology filtering
goa_to_selected_uniprot_mapping_ratio.numerator_definition: qualifying GOA accessions resolving to one sequence in the selected UniProt scope

mf_evaluable_ratio.denominator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with propagated GO annotations
mf_evaluable_ratio.numerator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with at least one evaluable molecular-function term

propagated_term_evaluable_ratio.denominator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows with propagated GO annotations
propagated_term_evaluable_ratio.numerator_definition: mapped labelled protein rows retaining at least one development-universe term

qualifying_annotation_retention_ratio.denominator_definition: qualifying annotation rows entering mapping and label construction
qualifying_annotation_retention_ratio.numerator_definition: qualifying annotation rows whose own accession completes the mapping and retained-cluster chain

retained_cluster_member_ratio.denominator_definition: all frozen UniRef90 FASTA members clustered by MMseqs2
retained_cluster_member_ratio.numerator_definition: UniRef90 members in clusters retained by a qualifying selected-UniProt annotation

selected_uniprot_to_uniref90_mapping_rat.denominator_definition: qualifying GOA accessions resolving to one selected-UniProt sequence
selected_uniprot_to_uniref90_mapping_rat.numerator_definition: selected-UniProt accessions mapped uniquely to a UniRef90 FASTA member
